clean_text:
Online loan with 1 CLICK speed
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/consumer-loans/1-click
[Section: Online loan with 1 CLICK speed]
Apply and receive up to 15.000.000 AMD online loan in a few seconds without a guarantor and additional documentation. Check the available limit through sprintonline.am platform or on InecoMobile application, 24/7, on all days of the week.
[Section: Fast and Available]
You can apply for 1 CLICK Online loan through InecoMobile and InecoOnline applications without visiting branches of the Bank. The loan is approved in a few seconds in a sequence of 4 simple steps.
[Section: Without Additional Paperwork]
Receive 1 CLICK online loan with no income statement, guarantor or collateral. Simple log in to sprintonline.am, InecoOnline and InecoMobile and receive your personal offer. In case you do not have an account in Inecobank, you can always register through our online channels hassle free within a few minutes. To register online, you need a social security card, phone number, and email address.
[Section: Up to AMD 15 million]
By applying for 1 CLICK online loan, you can get a loan of AMD 100.000 to AMD 15.000.000 with up to 60 months maturity period. The amount and term of the loan depend on your choice and your credit risk score.
Updated as of 12.03.2026 15:25
